source_of_truth.note: MVP.md was not present in the worktree, so the required task timestamp could not be applied.

branch.ready_condition: Worktree is attached to fix; commit from this branch after staging only the approved source, test, and intentional audit-report files.

commit_packaging_note: The current CLI and CLI smoke-test diff contains both DB/scope lifecycle fixes and proof-build binary timing-contract guards.
The hunks are interleaved in shared command parsing, benchmark metadata, and smoke-test fixtures.
This checkpoint is treated as one stabilization commit to avoid unsafe partial staging.
Generated final-gate artifacts, DBs, logs, and copied benchmark workspaces remain excluded.
shared_preflight_lifecycle: Added shared DB lifecycle preflight around DbLifecyclePreflight and store-level DbPreflightReport.
Centralized repo-root, schema, storage mode, passport, freshness/integrity, and scope compatibility checks.
Added structured scope source, scope hash, mismatch, policy, blocker, warning, and status evidence.
non_default_scope_read_behavior: Read commands without explicit scope flags use the passport scope and report scope_source=passport.
Explicit matching scope reads report scope_source=explicit.
Explicit incompatible scope reads fail with scope_mismatch and expected/observed scope hashes.
stale_cleanup_for_newly_ignored_paths: Incremental update checks existing indexed facts before ignore skip.
Now-ignored previously indexed files are cleaned with now_ignored and scope_changed reasons.
Deleted files are cleaned before ignore decisions.
Update output reports ignored path cleanup counters and path_cleanup_reasons.
include_aware_pruning: An include pattern no longer globally disables pruning of unrelated excluded directories.
Scope audit records include-aware directory prune decisions.
mcp_status_passport_gate: Unsafe DBs return db_problem, safe_to_query=false, blockers, warnings, and preflight/passport metadata.
Safe DBs still return counts plus passport summary.
tests_added: CLI passport scope read and mismatch tests.
proof_build_binary_timing_contract: Benchmark outputs expose binary metadata such as executable path, exact command, binary profile, debug assertions, and claimability.
Debug proof-build timing is diagnostic-only and cannot produce a production threshold verdict without explicit allowance.
Release proof-build timing is marked claimable only when produced by the release binary.

blocked_literal_commands.reason: No Cargo package named codegraph-mcp exists in this workspace.
No Cargo package named codegraph-mcp exists in this workspace.

manual_smokes: CLI non-default index and query used scope_source=passport.
CLI context-pack after non-default index used scope_source=passport.
CLI update after ignore change deleted stale facts for the newly ignored file.
MCP status/search agreed on safe DBs.
MCP status/search rejected unsafe copied DB consistently.
full_tests: cargo test --workspace -- --test-threads=1 passed: 424 passed, 0 failed, 3 ignored
git diff --check passed with CRLF warnings only

reports_not_intended_for_commit: Any report generated by local smoke/gate tooling that is not one of the intentional audit reports in commit_contents.docs_audit_reports.

suggested_commit_message.subject: fix: harden DB lifecycle and benchmark timing guards
body_bullets: reuse stored passport scope for read/update paths
delete stale facts for now-ignored files
make include-aware pruning avoid unrelated excluded dirs
route MCP status through shared DB preflight
add regression tests for scope/passport lifecycle
mark non-release proof-build timings as diagnostic-only

pre_commit_checklist: Confirm the worktree is still attached to fix.
Stage only proposed source, test, and intentional audit report files.
Verify no staged path matches generated DB, WAL/SHM, log, target, final-report, benchmark payload, or CGC artifact patterns.
